data.content: Implementation pushed for branch review. Branch: knots-4023-clarify-child-knot-creation. Commit: 597fbcf284cf. Updated loom/work_sdlc/prompts/planning.md (Hierarchy Gate section, Actions step 7 with kno q / kno new -f / -p autopilot_no_planning, recommended kno edge add ordering). Patched only the planning prompt body in loom/work_sdlc/dist/bundle.json so unrelated bundle drift stayed out of scope. Added regression assertion in src/loom_compat_prompt_resolution_tests.rs and a patch changeset. make sanity passed (1122 tests, 95.23% coverage).
